_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to demonstrate fair play and reflect on how ethical behaviour influences outcomes and experiences in physical activity.

_source.w: We are learning to demonstrate fair play and reflect on how ethical behaviour influences outcomes and experiences in physical activity.
y: Fair play is a value that extends far beyond sport — it shapes the kind of people and communities we become.
Ethical behaviour creates positive experiences that encourage lifelong participation.
Reflecting on ethics develops our moral reasoning and sense of responsibility.
eg: Demonstrating fair play in a competitive situation — even when it is difficult.
Reflecting on a situation where fair play was or was not upheld and its impact on participants.
Discussing how doping, cheating, and poor sportsmanship undermine sport.
Analysing how ethical behaviour creates a more positive environment for all participants.
Investigating how sporting codes of conduct promote fair play.
Presenting a case study on ethical behaviour in sport and its impact on outcomes.
